title: The US attacked Iran’s Kharg Island. What it could mean for oil prices.
summary: Kharg Island, a tiny coral outcrop off the Iranian coast, ships 90% of the country’s oil exports.

title: Don’t tweak portfolios amid crude oil price spike: Dr Joseph Thomas, Emkay Wealth Management explains why
summary: A prolonged conflict that leads to crude prices remaining sticky above US$ 100 per barrel may have an outsized impact on growth trajectories, at both GDP and individual business levels, said Dr Joseph Thomas of Emkay Wealth Management.

title: Crude oil prices may touch $150/barrel. What does it mean for Indian stock market, gold and silver rates?
summary: Mirae Asset Sharekhan estimates if crude oil prices remain elevated in the $85–$90 range for the next two months, earnings growth expectations may be revised lower to around 10% from 12-14% currently for FY27.

title: The Netherlands’ new tax experiment—and why investors should worry
summary: The Netherlands plans to tax unrealized investment gains from 2028. India’s experience with punitive wealth and income taxes in the 1970s shows why taxing paper wealth can distort markets and behaviour.

title: Advance Tax Deadline News Today LIVE: Final instalment to be paid on 15 March — check details
summary: Advance Tax Deadline News Today LIVE: The due date for paying the fourth and final instalment for the financial year 2025–26 is on Sunday, 15 March 2026. Check who needs to pay, how to pay online, among other details.
